task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a channel named 'LIS_ACK_Normalizer' in the channels list or dashboard of the integration engine (e.g., Mirth Connect Administrator).

task_completion.description: Configure the source to receive on TCP port 6661
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Source tab/settings for the channel. It should be configured as a TCP Listener (or similar) on port 6661.

task_completion.description: Configure the destination to send to localhost port 6662
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Destinations tab/settings. There should be a destination configured as a TCP Sender (or similar) pointing to localhost (or 127.0.0.1) on port 6662.
Look for a File Writer destination, a JavaScript writer step, or postprocessor code that explicitly references the file path '/home/ga/ack_audit.log' and writes the raw response to it.

task_completion.description: Implement logic to normalize MSA-3 based on MSA-1
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for JavaScript code, transformers, or mapping rules that check the value of MSA-1 (e.g., 'AA', 'AE', 'AR') and modify MSA-3 to 'Processed Successfully' or 'Remote Error' if it is missing.
Look at the Dashboard or deployment screen. The 'LIS_ACK_Normalizer' channel should be listed with a status of 'Deployed', 'Started', or actively running.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual integration engine software (e.g., Mirth Connect Administrator) to configure the channel.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the UI of an integration engine like Mirth Connect, not just a text editor with a mock configuration file.

integrity.description: The agent implemented conditional logic rather than hardcoding a single static ACK response.
integrity.visual_evidence: The normalization logic should show conditional statements (if/else) checking MSA-1, rather than a hardcoded string replacement for all messages.

integrity.description: The channel was genuinely deployed in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: The dashboard should show realistic deployment status, not just a preview or a disconnected UI state.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Channel Name: LIS_ACK_Normalizer. Source Port: 6661. Destination Port: 6662. Audit File: /home/ga/ack_audit.log. Sample File: /home/ga/documents/sample_adt.hl7. The task requires creating a channel in an integration engine (like Mirth Connect) with these parameters, implementing specific logic to normalize MSA-3 based on MSA-1, logging the raw response, and deploying the channel.
